Laguna Prerequisites

Jun 7, 2025 CMC QCL

CARC Account

In this session, we will be working with you to make sure you have an account on the Laguna cluster.

  1. Open https://hpcaccount.usc.edu
  2. Choose your school (It will bring you to your school’s SSO)
  3. Check if you are assigned to the Project named “CMC_Onboarding”
  4. If you have any trouble, let us know.

For additional information, check out CARC’s Getting Started guide: https://uschpc.github.io/regional-computing-website/user-guides/get-started-laguna.html

  • Murty Sunak Quantative and Computing Lab
  • qcl@cmc.edu

    HPC research computing onboarding resources and updates.
